# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
      - develop
      - "release/**"
    tags:
      - "v*"
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: build-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: internal-build-${{ github.repository }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ github.sha }}
  DIST_DIR: dist
  BUILD_DIR: build
  BIN_DIR: build/bin
  CONFIG_DIR: config
  SCRIPTS_DIR: scripts

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up environment
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}" "${BUILD_DIR}" "${BIN_DIR}"

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/build.sh
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            make
          else
            echo "No build script (./scripts/build.sh) or Makefile found."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}/bin"
          if [ -d "${BIN_DIR}" ]; then
            rsync -a --prune-empty-dirs --include='*/' --include='*' --exclude='.*' "${BIN_DIR}/" "${DIST_DIR}/bin/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "bin" ]; then
            rsync -a --prune-empty-dirs --include='*/' --include='*' --exclude='.*' "bin/" "${DIST_DIR}/bin/" || true
          fi
          find "${DIST_DIR}/bin" -type f -maxdepth 2 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

      - name: Collect configuration files
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}/config"
          if [ -d "${CONFIG_DIR}" ]; then
            rsync -a "${CONFIG_DIR}/" "${DIST_DIR}/config/"
          fi
          if [ -d "configs" ]; then
            rsync -a "configs/" "${DIST_DIR}/config/" || true
          fi

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}/deploy"
          if [ -d "${SCRIPTS_DIR}" ]; then
            rsync -a --exclude='**/build.sh' "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/" "${DIST_DIR}/deploy/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "deploy" ]; then
            rsync -a "deploy/" "${DIST_DIR}/deploy/" || true
          fi

      - name: Add build metadata
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}/metadata"
          cat > "${DIST_DIR}/metadata/build-info.txt" <<EOF
          repository=${{ github.repository }}
          ref=${{ github.ref }}
          ref_name=${{ github.ref_name }}
          sha=${{ github.sha }}
          run_id=${{ github.run_id }}
          run_number=${{ github.run_number }}
          actor=${{ github.actor }}
          workflow=${{ github.workflow }}
          EOF

      - name: Create archive
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          tar -C "${DIST_DIR}" -czf "${DIST_DIR}.tar.gz" .

      - name: Upload build artifacts (downloadable)
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}/
            ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}.tar.gz
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 6
          overwrite: true
